project_name: Home Modular Ireland - Cinematic Storytelling Experience
art_direction_thesis: The Cinematic Walkthrough: A singular, scroll-driven narrative that contrasts the organic, misty Irish landscape with the precision of high-end Scandinavian modular architecture. The design acts as an interactive film—a pseudo-3D space utilizing CSS transforms, layered parallax, and dynamic lighting to simulate physical presence, walking momentum, and tactile exploration without relying on WebGL.

scale.marquee: text-5xl md:text-7xl tracking-widest uppercase font-light text-[#123524]

typography.notes: LOCKED by client. DO NOT CHANGE fonts. Use Cormorant Garamond for display/headings. Inter for UI, body, labels, and micro-copy.

colors.notes: LOCKED. #123524 (Deep Forest Green) is used for high-impact surfaces. #C6A35A (Warm Brass) for active states and accents. #FAF8F5 (Warm Off-White) for light sections.

visual_enhancers.grain_noise_recipe: Fixed position pointer-events-none overlay with a base64 noise background (opacity 0.03 - 0.05). Adds a filmic, cinematic texture to kill digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.lighting_overlays: Use radial-gradient overlays (opacity-30 to opacity-60) tied to mouse movement to simulate a soft spotlight on product photography.
visual_enhancers.cursor_treatment: Custom cursor: a small precise dot by default. When hovering over a hotspot, the cursor expands into a glowing ring or 'Explore' label.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism_spec: backdrop-blur-2xl bg-white/10 (dark mode) or bg-black/5 (light mode), 1px solid border border-white/20, shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.12)]. Inner padding minimum p-6.

grids.bento_grid: Used selectively in manifesto chapters: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8. Images span 8 cols, text spans 4 cols.
grids.hotspot_layout: Absolute positioning over relative containers (images). Coordinated via x/y percentages.

layouts.spacing_philosophy: Generous Spacing. Use p-12, py-24, or py-32 for section padding. Negative space builds luxury.

scenes.description: Signature on-load moment. Masked line-by-line reveal of hero copy ('The Next Era of Living'). Dark background, elegant text.

Hero Exterior. Pinned 100vh section. Layered absolute images: sky, misty hills, house, foreground elements. As user scrolls, scale and translateZ are applied inversely to layers to create a dolly-in pseudo-3D effect.
Chapter 01 — The Land. Editorial section break with large numbers, rich text, and a clipped-frame image reveal.
Entrance. Camera approaches front door (scale up). Scroll triggers a blur-transition, the door image splits/fades, lighting shifts from natural to warm interior, simulating entering the home.
Luxury Kitchen (primary showcase). Horizontal pan (translateX) linked to scroll. Features 'MaterialHotspot' glass cards pulsing over key elements (oak flooring, brass fixtures).
Slow continuous marquee: 'CRAFTED IN IRELAND · MODULAR · TIMELESS'. text-[#123524] on #FAF8F5 background.
Living Room. Warm atmosphere, fireplace. Minimal UI. Subtle parallax on windows showing exterior landscape moving slightly.
Exit / CTA. Drone-style pullback (scale down) revealing the landscape again. Central CTA: 'Book a Consultation' (pill button, luxury hover state).

motion.philosophy: Simulate walking, breathing, weight, momentum. Never teleport. Use Power3.inOut or Expo.easeOut.
motion.scroll_engine: Lenis for smooth scrolling momentum. GSAP ScrollTrigger for pinning and scrubbing animations.

choreography.entrance: Elements reveal via clip-path (inset) from bottom to top, paired with subtle upward translation and scale-down from 1.05 to 1.0.
choreography.in_view: Scrubbed parallax. Foreground elements move faster, background elements move slower.
choreography.exit: Elements gently blur and fade as they move out of the focal plane.

motion.micro_interactions: Hotspots pulse slowly. Hovering a hotspot scales it up (spring physics via Framer Motion) and reveals glass info card.

accessibility.focus_states: All interactive elements (hotspots, nav, CTA) must have distinct focus rings or scale shifts.
accessibility.aria: Use aria-hidden='true' for purely decorative parallax elements. Hotspots must be button elements with descriptive aria-labels.
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion: disable scroll-scrubbed pseudo-3D if requested.
accessibility.audio: Ambient audio toggle MUST start muted. Explicit user action required to play.

media.treatment: Clipped-frame product photography. Images are wrapped in containers with overflow-hidden and scaled down from 1.2 to 1.0 on scroll. Never standard raw squares.
media.overlay: Always use a subtle black/30 to black/50 overlay on hero background layers to ensure typography contrast.

3d_libraries.recommendation: DO NOT USE WebGL/R3F as requested by the client. Rely on CSS transforms (perspective, translate3d, scale) powered by GSAP to create the illusion of depth (Pseudo-3D).

cabin.description: Modern wood cabin exterior to serve as the modular home focal point.

kitchen.description: Luxury minimal scandinavian kitchen for the panning hotspot scene.

living_room.description: Warm modern living room with fireplace for the ambient motion scene.

instructions_to_main_agent: Focus heavily on the GSAP ScrollTrigger implementation for the 5 scenes. The architecture should wrap the entire app in Lenis for smooth scrolling. Create a SceneManager component that handles pinned 100vh sections. Use absolute positioning and z-index for the pseudo-3D layers. Integrate Framer Motion purely for UI micro-interactions (like the pulsing hotspots and glass navigation) while keeping GSAP strictly for scroll-driven page structure. Strict adherence to the locked color palette and fonts is mandatory.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: 1. Do not center align the app container. 2. Every interaction needs micro-animations (hover states, transitions). 3. Apply a film grain overlay globally (opacity 0.04) using CSS. 4. Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. 5. Do not use generic standard box-shadows; use layered ambient shadows or strict glassmorphism. 6. The header nav must use glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl) and never a pure transparent background. 7. Add data-testid to all interactive elements.
